# 888台灣的公司關係網

Explore Taiwan company registration summaries and direct relationship-index links.

## Agent Skill

- Skill instructions: https://taiwan-company-network.david888.com/skill/
- API contract: https://taiwan-company-network.david888.com/openapi.json
- GET API index: https://taiwan-company-network.david888.com/api/v1/index.json
- Source: https://github.com/tbdavid2019/taiwan-company-network

Relationship links are index data and must not be described as independently verified ownership or investment claims.
